name: Darrell Lea Milk Chocolate Nougat Egg 150g
short_description: Our Easter goodies are made to be shared. Hand crafted with only the finest ingredients, this irresistible Darrell Lea Nougat Easter Egg is made with a light, fluffy coconut nougat centre, then smothered in smooth, creamy Darrell Lea milk chocolate. Share the good stuff this Easter.
description:
Deliciously light & fluffy coconut nought centre, smothered in  smoooth & creamy Darrell Lea milk chocolate.

Ingredients

Nougat Centre (81%) [Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Desiccated Coconut (7%), Egg Albumen, Water, Honey, Natural Flavour, Salt, Natural Colour (160a)], Milk Chocolate (16%) [Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifiers (322 (Soy), 476), Natural Flavour], Milk Compound (3%) [Vegetable Fat (Coconut), Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Solids, Emulsifiers (322 (Soy), 476), Natural Flavours], Milk Chocolate contains 28% Cocoa Solids and 24% Milk Solids

CONTAINS EGG, MILK AND SOY

MAY CONTAIN WHEAT, GLUTEN, PEANUTS, TREE NUTS.
